title: RenderMeshOptions
description: RenderMeshOptions: Defines options for the Meshing of BHoM Objects.

Element1DRefinement.description: Regulates the refinement of Pipe meshes for 1DElements, i.e. the number of faces of the Pipes.

Element2DRefinement.description: Regulates the refinement of surface meshes for 2DElements.

CustomDataColorKey.description: The key of the BHoMObjects' CustomData dictionary where colour information might be found.

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
